title: Arm-er Stands
description: Want your armor stands to have arms? Simply throw 2 sticks at any armor stand and Voilà!
body:
Ever wanted to give some tools or weapons to your armor stands, just to realize they're as armless as a creeper?  **Well, with this pack, all you have to do is throw 2 sticks at any armor stand and Voilà!** **It now has arms!**

### For support or if you just want to join, check out our discord server!
### _(psst.. you may also get sneak previews of upcoming updates here..)_
[https://discord.gg/bNArp8qFB2](https://discord.gg/bNArp8qFB2)
